ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "footedness" TEXT /* The foot the player is most comfortable with */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., attacking, defensive, midfield) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Federation overseeing the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team A */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team B */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of Team A */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of Team B */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, played, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this stat entry is associated with */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accrued from the player's performance */,
  "distance_run" REAL /* Total distance run by the player in kilometers */,
  "accurate_passes" INTEGER /* Number of accurate passes made by the player */,
  "completed_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_stats" (
  "advanced_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this advanced stat is associated with */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Season during which the stats were recorded */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals scored by the player based on performance metrics */,
  "expected_goals_conceded" REAL /* Expected goals conceded by the team based on performance metrics */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* Index representing the player's influence on the game */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Index representing the player's creativity */,
  "influence" REAL /* Overall influence score of the player */,
  "xG_per90" REAL /* Expected goals per 90 minutes */,
  "xA_per90" REAL /* Expected assists per 90 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advanced_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_season_name FOREIGN KEY ("season_name") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_stats" (
  "cost_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player this cost stat is associated with */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Season during which the financial data was recorded */,
  "start_cost" REAL /* Initial financial cost of the player at the start of the season */,
  "end_cost" REAL /* Financial cost of the player at the end of the season */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points accrued by the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's annual salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_stats_season_name FOREIGN KEY ("season_name") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, assist, yellow card) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred during the match */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_log_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_log_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
